patch.value: todos import/export unusable via CLI: importer/exporter registrations omit arguments+flags

registerImporter('todos',h) and registerExporter('todos',h) are called WITHOUT the 3rd options arg, so the derived 'pm todos import'/'pm todos export' commands have NO declared positional file argument and NO flag contracts. Result: 'pm todos import f.jsonl' -> 'Too many arguments'; '--file f' -> unknown option; empty --help. The handlers already READ ctx.args[0] + all options, so only the registration contract is missing. By contrast 'pm todos sync' is a registerCommand WITH flags and works perfectly via CLI. Fix: pass {arguments:[{name:'file'}], flags:[...]} to both registrations mirroring the sync command. Verified against pm-cli 2026.7.10; bundled pm-csv (which declares its contracts) works, confirming this is a pm-todos authoring gap.

Fixed: added arguments+flags contracts to registerImporter/registerExporter('todos'). Verified via CLI in a throwaway workspace: 'pm todos import f.jsonl --format jsonl' imports (positional accepted), '--file' form works, '--help' lists 8 flags, unknown '--bogus' now rejected with 'Expected one of' list, 'pm todos export --format jsonl' emits correct jsonl with exact status. SDK/action path unchanged (no regression); 117 unit tests pass.

author: codex

patch.value: Fixed: added arguments and all 13 declared flag contracts to registerImporter/registerExporter('todos'). Verified via CLI in a throwaway workspace: positional and --file imports work; --help lists all importer flags; unknown options show the supported set; JSONL export preserves exact status. SDK/action path remains compatible and the full test suite passes.

message: Correct importer flag count per CodeRabbit review
